allies.rationale_text: Analogies-and-metaphors strengthens association by turning new patterns into fast, recognizable mental buckets without long explanation.
Systems-thinking helps association connect isolated facts into interrelationships rather than leaving them as disconnected observations.
allies.source_quote: the value lies in seeing the relatedness and the effects from the relatedness

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias makes association dangerous when it reinforces the first preferred pattern instead of testing alternatives.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Association conflicts with first-principles-thinking when familiar pattern-matching substitutes for decomposition of novel causal structure.
structured_tensions.source_quote: association conflicts with first-principles-thinking (first principles thinking) when familiar pattern-matching substitutes for decomposition of novel causal structure.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Association conflicts with confirmation-bias when associative links are selectively activated to reinforce a pre-existing narrative rather than tested against disconfirming evidence.
structured_tensions.source_quote: association conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when associative links are selectively activated to reinforce a pre-existing narrative rather than tested against disconfirming evidence.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Association conflicts with scientific-method-evidence-testing when resemblance-based connections are treated as causal without controlled testing.
structured_tensions.source_quote: association conflicts with scientific-method-evidence-testing (scientific method evidence testing) when resemblance-based connections are treated as causal without controlled testing.

curation_notes.summary: Relation surface stays inside the current graph vocabulary and keeps omission stronger than weak forcing.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 3 target ids or import donor-shaped relation neighborhoods to rescue weak local grounding.
open_questions: Some source-real neighbors remain omitted because the current graph vocabulary would force weaker mappings than this conservative pass allows.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only and is noted only in batch artifacts.
antagonists: No multihop or higher-order semantics were introduced in these Wave 3 files.
structured_tensions: Explicit tensions were preserved only where the raw source clearly earned a current-vocabulary target.
